endpoints.description: Docin document search/list HTML. browser_api_call compacts search.do pages into ranked candidate document links with id, title, detail URL, pageCount hints, file-format hints, upload-date hints, and snippets. Use this before detail fanout when Docin DOM/AX state is slow or unstable.
strategy_notes: Build a search URL with searchcat=1001 and nkey=<url-encoded keywords> for general document search.

For PPT most-read tasks, use observed Docin filter params dt=3 (PPT), od=2 (most read), numpage=2 (9-100 pages), and yearType=1/2 (current/previous calendar year), then verify exact page/date constraints from detail pages.
Call the compacted candidate detail URLs with the Docin detail adapter only when fields such as exact page count, upload time, or format must be verified.

If this endpoint returns 403 or the visible page shows slider verification, avoid repeated filter clicking; try one direct filtered URL and then report blocking if no p-<id>.html candidates are observable.

endpoints.description: Docin document detail HTML. browser_api_call compacts it into title, pageCount, uploadTime, format, fileSize, readCount, commentCount, favoriteCount, categories, and audit/unavailable status. Use it for search-result detail fanout instead of opening heavy reader tabs.
strategy_notes: Use Docin search/list pages to collect candidate p-<id>.html links after applying query, format, year, and sort filters.
Call this detail endpoint for top candidates to verify page count, upload time, format, read count, and audit status without switching tabs.
If the compacted detail says unavailable_reason=审核中, skip that candidate immediately.
Docin may not expose true download count or rating in detail HTML; if absent after one compact detail call, report readCount/visible score fields and mark missing fields as not shown.
